rationale: Educ. Code §11.165 governs access to school campuses for after-school activities. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district may adopt rules to keep school campuses, including school libraries, open for recreational activities, latchkey programs, and tutoring after school hours.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
